# Odds & Ends Handyman Service

## Business Information
- **Name**: Odds & Ends Handyman Service
- **Owner**: Daniel Kiely
- **Established**: 2001
- **Experience**: 20+ years
- **Location**: Rockland County, New York
- **Phone**: (908) 461-2688
- **Email**: Dkiely@oddsandendshandymanservice.com
- **Website**: https://oddsandendshandymanservice.com
- **Free Estimates**: Yes

## About
Odds & Ends Handyman Service is a professional handyman business serving homeowners throughout Rockland County, New York. Founded in 2001 by Daniel Kiely, the business has over 20 years of experience in home repair, maintenance, and improvement. Dan is known for meticulous attention to detail, creative problem-solving, honest pricing, and leaving every workspace cleaner than he found it. The business has a perfect 5-star rating on Google with 23 reviews.

## Services Offered
- TV Mounting
- Drywall Repair
- Door Installation
- Fence Repair
- Deck Repair
- Furniture Assembly
- Light Fixture Installation
- Toilet Installation
- Faucet Installation
- Tile Repair
- Painting
- Shelving Installation
- Cabinet Refinishing
- Picture Hanging
- Shelf Installation
- Air Filter Replacement
- Light Bulb Replacement
- Paint Touch-Ups
- Doorknob and Handle Replacement
- Smart Home Device Setup (includes smoke detectors)
- Curtain and Blind Installation
- Cabinet and Drawer Hardware Installation
- Shower Head Replacement
- Ceiling Fan Installation and Replacement
- Minor Plumbing Fixes
- Smart Home Device Setup
- Home Office Setup
- Closet System Installation
- Custom Accent Walls
- Wainscoting
- Built-Ins

## Services NOT Offered
- Roofing
- Major electrical work
- Large remodels

## Business Credentials
- Licensed Home Improvement Contractor (Lic# H-25-600, Rockland County)
- Million dollar general liability insurance policy
- Owner operated, licensed, and local
- Specializes in small and medium sized renovations

## Service Areas
Rockland County and Westchester County, New York, including:
- Nyack
- New City
- Nanuet
- Pearl River
- Spring Valley
- Haverstraw
- Stony Point
- Clarkstown
- Orangetown
- Ramapo
- Suffern
- Piermont
- Grandview-on-Hudson
- Sparkill
- Tappan
- Pomona
- Airmont
- Chestnut Ridge
- Montebello
- New Hempstead
- Sloatsburg
- Upper Nyack
- Congers
- Blauvelt
- Valley Cottage
- Thiells
- Garnerville
- Sleepy Hollow (Westchester)
- Tarrytown (Westchester)
- Irvington (Westchester)
- Dobbs Ferry (Westchester)

## Key Differentiators
1. 20+ years of hands-on experience
2. Perfect 5-star Google rating (23 reviews)
3. Meticulous attention to detail
4. Leaves workspace cleaner than found
5. Creative problem-solving — often exceeds expectations
6. Honest, transparent pricing
7. Free estimates with no obligation
8. Responsive communication — text or call
9. Wide range of skills — from small repairs to custom projects
10. Local, owner-operated business
